title: ilex amara f. humboldtiana
intro: Ilex amara f. humboldtiana, also known as the American Holly, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex amara f. humboldtiana include reducing fever, relieving arthritis, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. Ilex amara f. humboldtiana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically in the form of salves and creams.
